EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPointCollection3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that manipulate the points of a Multipoint.

[Guid("AF10D3E8-F2F8-49EC-A6C5-7018099EEAED")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPointCollection3 : IPointCollection2, IPointCollection

An indexed vertex enumerator for this point collection.
